title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Group D Posts
description: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) hasdeclared the latest job notification for the recruitment of 06 Group D Jobs. Candidates with a 10th pass can apply for the BMC Recruitment 2026 . Here we mentioned more about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply before the deadline of application. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all ...
